name: cult-timer
title: Timer
author: Cult UI
description: Tracks and formats elapsed time while exposing compound display controls.

changes: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils so the copied support file resolves both in this batch and at the registry target.
Disabled per-frame polite announcements and marked the clock icon decorative.
Replaced requestAnimationFrame state churn with an adaptive timeout scheduler that updates at 20Hz only for hundredths and once per second for second-only formats.

Added elapsed-time accumulation, document-visibility pausing, internal Timer-root IntersectionObserver pausing, and a reduced-motion fallback for the spinning icon without changing the public timer API.
Removed the unrelated absoluteUrl helper and retained only the cn support closure.

modifications.change: Changed the cn import to ../../lib/utils, disabled repeated live announcements, marked the icon decorative, replaced requestAnimationFrame updates with an adaptive timeout scheduler, accumulated elapsed time across pauses, paused for document-hidden state and through internal Timer-root visibility observation, and disabled icon spin under reduced motion.
modifications.reason: Resolve the copied helper, keep elapsed time readable without announcement spam, and prevent continuous work when the timer is hidden, offscreen, or does not need subsecond updates.
Keep the copied support closure minimal and remove the Cult UI site URL default.
